Info

Defines ats_utilities.info package.

class ats_utilities.info.ATSBuildDate(checker: IATSChecker | None = None, reporter: IATSReporter | None = None, verbose: bool = False)[source]¶

Bases: IATSBuildDate

Defines class ATSBuildDate with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for the ATS build date in one property object. The ATS build date container.

It defines:

attributes:
ERRORS - Error checker mapping.
__checker - Error checker.
__reporter - ATSReporter for messaging.
__verbose - Enable/Disable verbose option.
__build_date - The ATS build date.
methods:
__init__ - Initials ATSBuildDate constructor.
build_date - Property methods for set/get operations.
is_build_date_not_none - Checks is ATS build date not None.
ERRORS¶

alias of ErrorChecker

_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
property build_date: str | None¶

Property method for getting ATS build date.

Returns:

The ATS build date | None

Return type:

<Optional[str]>

Exceptions:

None

is_build_date_not_none() → bool[source]¶

Checks is ATS build date not None.

Returns:

True (ATS build date is not None) | False.

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None

class ats_utilities.info.ATSInfo(info: Dict[Any, Any], checker: IATSChecker | None = None, reporter: IATSReporter | None = None, verbose: bool = False)[source]¶

Bases: ATSName, ATSVersion, ATSLicence, ATSBuildDate, ATSInfoOk

Defines class ATSInfo with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for the ATS information in one container object. The ATS information container.

It defines:

attributes:
ERRORS - Error checker mapping.
ATS_NAME - The ATS name key.
ATS_VERSION - The ATS version key.
ATS_LICENCE - The ATS licence key.
ATS_BUILD_DATE - The ATS build date key.
ATS_BASE_INFO - The ATS base information dict.
__checker - Error checker.
__reporter - ATSReporter for messaging.
__verbose - Enable/Disable verbose option.
methods:
__init__ - Initials ATSInfo constructor.
show_base_info - Shows ATS information.
is_correct - Checks information structure.
ATS_BASE_INFO: dict[int, str] = {1: 'ats_name', 2: 'ats_version', 3: 'ats_licence', 4: 'ats_build_date'}¶
ATS_BUILD_DATE: str = 'ats_build_date'¶
ATS_LICENCE: str = 'ats_licence'¶
ATS_NAME: str = 'ats_name'¶
ATS_VERSION: str = 'ats_version'¶
ERRORS¶

alias of ErrorChecker

_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
is_correct(info: Dict[Any, Any], verbose: bool = False) → bool[source]¶

Checks information structure.

Parameters:

  • info (<Dict[Any, Any]>) – The ATS base information

  • verbose (<bool>) – Enable/Disable verbose option

Returns:

True (all info params are ok) | False

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

ATSTypeError

show_base_info() → None[source]¶

Shows ATS information.

Exceptions:

None

class ats_utilities.info.ATSInfoOk(checker: IATSChecker | None = None, reporter: IATSReporter | None = None, verbose: bool = False)[source]¶

Bases: IATSInfoOk

Defines class ATSInfoOk with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for the ATS info status in one property object. The ATS info status container.

It defines:

attributes:
ERRORS - Error checker mapping.
__checker - Error checker.
__reporter - ATSReporter for messaging.
__verbose - Enable/Disable verbose option.
__ats_info_ok - The ATS information status.
methods:

ats_info_ok - Property methods for set/get operations.

alias of ErrorChecker

_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶

Property method for getting ATS information status.

The ATS information status

<bool>

__licence - The ATS licence.
